metadata.name: iam-instance-profile-atomic
metadata.title: IAM Instance Profile
metadata.subtitle: Single IAM instance profile resource
metadata.description: Create a standalone IAM instance profile associated with an existing IAM role. This is an atomic resource containing only the instance profile itself.
use_cases: Add instance profile to existing infrastructure
metadata.author: InnovativeApps

security.description: Implements security best practices for cloud infrastructure with network isolation, IAM roles, and secure access patterns.

reliability.description: Ensures high availability and fault tolerance.

performance_efficiency.description: Optimizes resource utilization and performance with scalable compute resources and efficient networking.

cost_optimization.description: Balances cost efficiency with reliability through appropriate resource sizing and usage-based pricing.

operational_excellence.description: Enables operational best practices with infrastructure as code, monitoring, and automated management.
best_practices: Infrastructure as Code with Pulumi for automated deployments

sustainability.description: Supports sustainable practices through efficient resource utilization and regional service usage.
